commands: docker run -d --name agones-palworld-e2e -p 8211:8211/udp -p 8212:8212/tcp -p 25575:25575/tcp -e PUID=1000 -e PGID=1000 -e SERVER_NAME=e2e -e ADMIN_PASSWORD=e2e-admin -e SERVER_PASSWORD=e2e-secret -e MAX_PLAYERS=4 -e RCON_ENABLED=true -e RCON_PORT=25575 -e RESTAPI_ENABLED=true -e RESTAPI_PORT=8212 -e MULTITHREAD_ENABLED=true -e COMMUNITY_SERVER=false -e BACKUP_ENABLED=false -e RESTART_ENABLED=false -e PLAYER_DETECTION_ENABLED=false -e RCON_PLAYER_DETECTION=false -e WORKSHOP_MOD_UPDATE_CRON='0 0 31 2 *' kbve/agones-palworld:latest

echo 'Waiting for Palworld REST (<=900s)...' && for i in $(seq 1 900); do if curl -fsS -u admin:e2e-admin http://127.0.0.1:8212/v1/api/info >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Palworld ready after ${i}s"; break; fi; if [ -z "$(docker ps -q -f name=agones-palworld-e2e -f status=running)" ]; then echo "Container exited early at ${i}s — dumping logs:"; docker logs agones-palworld-e2e 2>&1 | tail -160; docker rm -f agones-palworld-e2e 2>/dev/null || true; exit 1; fi; if [ $(( i % 30 )) -eq 0 ]; then echo "--- [${i}s] still waiting; container tail: ---"; docker logs --tail 3 agones-palworld-e2e 2>&1 | sed 's/^/  | /'; docker exec agones-palworld-e2e bash -lc 'f=$(find /palworld/Pal/Binaries/Win64/ue4ss -iname UE4SS.log 2>/dev/null | head -1); echo "[UE4SS.log]"; [ -n "$f" ] && tail -4 "$f" || echo "(none)"; g=$(ls -1t /palworld/Pal/Saved/Logs/*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1); echo "[Pal.log: ${g:-none}]"; [ -n "$g" ] && tail -6 "$g"' 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^/  | /'; fi; if [ $i -eq 900 ]; then echo 'Palworld REST did not come up in 900s — diagnostics:'; docker exec agones-palworld-e2e bash -lc 'echo "[ue4ss dir]"; ls -la /palworld/Pal/Binaries/Win64/ue4ss 2>/dev/null; echo "[UE4SS-settings console]"; grep -iE "ConsoleEnabled|GuiConsole" /palworld/Pal/Binaries/Win64/ue4ss/UE4SS-settings.ini 2>/dev/null; echo "[UE4SS.log tail]"; find /palworld/Pal/Binaries/Win64/ue4ss -iname UE4SS.log -exec tail -n 40 {} + 2>/dev/null; echo "[Pal game log tail]"; ls -1t /palworld/Pal/Saved/Logs/*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs -r tail -n 80; echo "[crashes]"; ls -la /palworld/Pal/Saved/Crashes 2>/dev/null; echo "[chat.log]"; cat /shared/chat/chat.log 2>/dev/null' 2>&1 | sed 's/^/  | /' || true; docker rm -f agones-palworld-e2e 2>/dev/null || true; exit 1; fi; sleep 1; done

echo 'Verifying UE4SS + PalChatRelay loaded (<=180s)...' && for i in $(seq 1 180); do f=$(docker exec agones-palworld-e2e bash -lc 'find /palworld/Pal/Binaries/Win64/ue4ss -iname UE4SS.log 2>/dev/null | head -1' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$f" ] && docker exec agones-palworld-e2e bash -lc "grep -qi PalChatRelay '$f'" 2>/dev/null; then echo "UE4SS + PalChatRelay loaded (log: $f)"; break; fi; if [ $(( i % 15 )) -eq 0 ]; then if [ -n "$f" ]; then echo "--- [${i}s] found UE4SS.log=$f tail: ---"; docker exec agones-palworld-e2e bash -lc "tail -5 '$f'" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^/  | /'; else echo "--- [${i}s] UE4SS.log not found yet ---"; fi; fi; if [ $i -eq 180 ]; then echo 'UE4SS/PalChatRelay did not load — diagnostics:'; docker exec agones-palworld-e2e bash -lc 'echo "[ue4ss dir]"; ls -la /palworld/Pal/Binaries/Win64/ue4ss 2>/dev/null; echo "[Mods]"; ls -la /palworld/Pal/Binaries/Win64/ue4ss/Mods 2>/dev/null; echo "[mods.txt]"; cat /palworld/Pal/Binaries/Win64/ue4ss/Mods/mods.txt 2>/dev/null; echo "[UE4SS.log]"; find /palworld/Pal/Binaries/Win64/ue4ss -iname UE4SS.log -exec tail -n 60 {} + 2>/dev/null; echo "[chat dir]"; ls -la /shared/chat 2>/dev/null' || true; docker logs agones-palworld-e2e 2>&1 | tail -80; docker rm -f agones-palworld-e2e 2>/dev/null || true; exit 1; fi; sleep 1; done

PALWORLD_HOST=127.0.0.1 PALWORLD_REST=8212 PALWORLD_ADMIN_PASSWORD=e2e-admin npx vitest run; EC=$?; echo '--- container logs ---'; docker logs agones-palworld-e2e 2>&1 | tail -120; docker rm -f agones-palworld-e2e 2>/dev/null || true; exit $EC
